title: Backport CVE-2025-9566 fixes
body:
I follow https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27023 to backport the fix for podman, but fail to build as the attached log.do_compile. It's hard to locate what's wrong in the failed log. Is there anybody could provide some hints?

Thanks very much!

[log.do_compile.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/24225569/log.do_compile.txt)

comments.body: @Mingli-001 where are you trying to backport to?  I will give you a heads up, this has been a very challenging backport for us, and we have been struggling with Podman v4.4.1 ourselves.

@TomSweeneyRedHat, Thanks for your response! I'm trying to backport to 5.0.1. Could you help to guide what's going wrong with the attached https://github.com/user-attachments/files/24225569/log.do_compile.txt. Thanks!

It is not our job to scroll to your large logs, if you have a concrete compile error message please just provide that one.

The PR diff https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27023 shows what works and upstream only ever supports the latest version so we cannot assist with your toolchain problems when building custom versions.

@Luap99 , Thanks very much for your respond! I just didn't find the error message from https://github.com/user-attachments/files/24225569/log.do_compile.txt, could you help to guide how to locate the error?  Thanks!
